title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Nivea India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Nivea India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!
